winner: Why did the banana roll out of my cart during the grocery store race? Because it knew I had a *peel* to win!

candidates.text: Why did the banana roll out of my cart during the grocery store race? Because it knew I had a *peel* to win!

candidates.text: I told my dog to roll over for a treat, but he just peeled a banana instead.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Creative twist with required words, concise and surprising"}

candidates.text: I told my friend I was going to roll with it, but then a banana peel flew at me and ruined everything.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.0, "reason": "Includes both required words, is concise, surprising, and specific with a relatable situation."}

candidates.text: I told my wife we needed to roll a banana peel down the stairs for fun, but she said it was too slippery. I said that’s the point. She just looked at me and said, "You’re not very good at this.
